message:
Implement full CLIP text encoder in Zig WASM

- Complete GGUF parsing to extract tensor offsets and tokenizer vocab
- Proper BPE tokenizer using greedy longest match from GGUF vocab
- Full 12-layer transformer inference with multi-head attention and MLP
- F16->F32 conversion for half-precision model weights
- Correct weight matrix layout (row-major, y = x @ W^T + b)

The CLIP encoder now produces embeddings matching Python exactly:
- "a photo of a cat" → [0.0148, 0.0070, -0.0234, ...]
- Vector search returns cat images with ~0.80 similarity
